options.systemMessage:
You are a senior qualification analyst for SWL Consulting, an AI-native consulting firm.

Your job: decide if an incoming Upwork prospect is a MATCH for SWL.

You have TWO tools:

1. `swl_services_kb` — returns SWL's full services catalog (8 service areas + tools + keywords + what we DON'T do). Call this first to understand scope.

2. `historical_sent_jobs` — returns jobs SWL actually sent proposals to in the last 60 days. Use this to learn SWL's REAL applied criteria (titles, budgets, areas they bet on). Treat 'Sent' as a positive signal — these passed manual review by the team.

Decision protocol:
- Step 1: Read the job title + description.
- Step 2: Query `swl_services_kb` to confirm the work falls inside one of the 8 service areas.
- Step 3: Query `historical_sent_jobs` filtered or sampled by similar title/keywords to see if SWL has applied to similar work. Quote 1–2 examples in your reason.
- Step 4: Decide: match=true ONLY if BOTH (a) services_kb confirms scope AND (b) you can justify why SWL would realistically apply (precedent or strong fit). Otherwise match=false.
- Step 5: Identify the service area name (one of the 8) or null if no match.

HARD EXCLUSIONS (always match=false): pure graphic design only, physical manufacturing, legal services, medical services, academic writing, civil/mechanical/electrical engineering.

Return ONLY structured JSON. Keep `reason` ≤ 25 words, concrete, referencing precedent when possible.

parameters.name: swl_services_kb
parameters.description: Returns the SWL Consulting services knowledge base: 8 service areas (Corporate Advisory & Finance, Business Operations & Back-Office, Project Management & BI, Sales & Customer Success, Marketing & Brand, AI & Automation, System Integrations, Digital Experience & Product Dev), what SWL does NOT take, plus tools and keywords per area. Call this to verify whether a job's scope fits SWL's catalog.
parameters.jsCode:
return `SWL CONSULTING — SERVICES CATALOG (for scope qualification)

Tagline: "Bigger Businesses, Stronger Teams". 120+ projects delivered. Full-service business consulting.

Industries served: Real Estate, SaaS, Healthcare, Retail, Home Services (HVAC, Plumbing, Pumping, Gyms, Environmental, Laboratory, Clinic), E-Commerce, Private Equity, Financial Services.

SWL DOES NOT TAKE (hard exclusions): pure graphic design only, physical manufacturing, legal services, medical services, academic writing, civil/mechanical/electrical engineering.

============================================================
AREA 1: CORPORATE ADVISORY & FINANCE
Services: CFO Advisory / Fractional CFO; Financial Modeling & Valuations (P&L, cashflow, DCF, IRR, MOIC, EBITDA, sensitivity, scenario); Budgeting & Forecasting (Budget vs Actual ≤10%); Financial Reporting (income statement, balance sheet, monthly close, exec dashboards); Business Plan & Pitch Deck; M&A Support, equity analysis, private equity; Profitability & Cost Optimization; Financial Process Optimization; Startup Mentorship (unit economics, pricing strategy).
Tools: Fathom HQ, Floatapp, Baremetrics, Churnkey, Triple Whale, QuickBooks (QBO), Xero, NetSuite, Odoo, Power BI, Looker Studio, BigQuery, Google Sheets, Finmark, LivePlan.
Keywords: CFO, Financial Analyst, Head of Finance, Finance Director, Financial Modeler, Forecast, Cashflow, P&L, Balance Sheet, Valuation, M&A, IRR, MOIC, DCF, EBITDA, Business Plan, Pitch Deck, Scenario Planning, Working Capital, Private Equity.

============================================================
AREA 2: BUSINESS OPERATIONS & BACK-OFFICE (Business Mastery)
Services: Bookkeeping & Accounting Support (R2R, bank reconciliation, chart of accounts, invoicing); Virtual Assistance & Documentation Control; Supply Chain, Inventory, Warehouse, Demand Planning, Procurement, Vendor Management; Payroll & HR Administration (records, onboarding/offboarding); ERP Implementation (Odoo, QuickBooks, NetSuite, Xero, ServiceTitan, Xfin); Invoice Automation & Quote-to-Cash; Treasury & Revenue Management; SOPs & Process Documentation; Operational Efficiency.
Tools: Odoo, QuickBooks, Xero, NetSuite, ServiceTitan, Xfin, Notion, Google Drive, Clockify, Docusign, Wave, Float App.
Keywords: Inventory Management, Warehouse Management, Procurement, Supply Chain, Bank Reconciliation, Treasury, Bookkeeper, Chart of Accounts, Business Operations, Business Consulting, Project Management, Notion, ClickUp, Asana, Jira.

============================================================
AREA 3: PROJECT MANAGEMENT & BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE
Services: End-to-end PM, SOW execution, milestone management; BI Dashboards & KPI Reporting; Data Science & Analytics; Account Management & feedback intelligence; Executive insights; Operational efficiency optimization; Dashboard Development (Power BI, Looker Studio, Google Sheets); Data Pipeline & Database Management (BigQuery, SQL).
Tools: Notion, Monday, Asana, ClickUp, Jira, Miro, Power BI, Looker Studio, BigQuery, Google Sheets, Odoo, Klipfolio, Tableau.
Keywords: Project Management, Business Intelligence, Dashboard, Reporting, KPIs, Data Analytics, Data Science, Power BI, Looker Studio, Tableau, BigQuery, SQL.

============================================================
AREA 4: SALES & CUSTOMER SUCCESS
Services: CRM Setup & Pipeline Intelligence (GoHighLevel, Kommo, HubSpot, Salesforce); Multi-channel Outreach (email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp/SMS, cold calling); GTM Strategy, market entry, sales playbooks; Customer Success & Retention (NPS, churn, onboarding); Revenue Growth, partnerships, upsell/cross-sell; Lead Generation & Qualification (Apollo, Clay, Clearbit, ZoomInfo); Commercial Playbooks; Client Health Management.
Tools: GoHighLevel, Kommo, HubSpot, Salesforce, Instantly, Manyreach, Smartlead, Lemlist, Apollo, Clay, Clearbit, ZoomInfo, Twilio, Bounceban, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Aircall, Gong.
Keywords: CRM, Salesforce, HubSpot, Instantly, Apollo, Email marketing, Lead Gen, Kommo, GoHighLevel, Lemlist, Clay, LinkedIn Ads, GTM Strategy, Market Entry, Growth Strategy, Customer Success, Retention, NPS, Churn.

============================================================
AREA 5: MARKETING & BRAND STRATEGY
Services: Social Media Management (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube); Content Planning & Creative Direction; Brand Identity & Marketing Strategy; SEO/SEM & Online Presence; Digital Advertising (Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn); Growth Marketing; Marketing Analytics & Conversion Tracking (GA4, attribution); Social Media Automation (Metricool, Buffer, Hootsuite).
Tools: Metricool, Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, GA4, Supermetrics, Gamma, Canva, Midjourney, Hootsuite, Buffer, SEMrush.
Keywords: Social Media Management, Content Planning, Brand Identity, SEO, SEM, Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Metricool, Canva, GA4, Growth Marketing, Marketing Analytics.

============================================================
AREA 6: AI & AUTOMATION
Services: AI Consulting & Strategy; Predictive Models & ML (forecasting, classification, churn); Chatbots & LLM Fine-Tuning; AI-Driven Business Tools; Intelligent Agents (LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen) and n8n agent workflows; RAG (knowledge bases, doc Q&A); AI training & onboarding; AI debugging/maintenance; Competitive Intelligence platforms.
Tools: n8n, Make, Zapier, LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, Python, Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, Supabase, AWS, Azure, FastAPI, Flask, Docker, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Synthflow, Twilio.
Keywords: AI, Machine Learning, LLM, NLP, Python, AI Agents, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, Prompt Engineering, MCP, Automation, n8n, Zapier, Make.com, Chatbot, Supabase, Pinecone.

============================================================
AREA 7: SYSTEM INTEGRATIONS & AUTOMATIONS
Services: System Architecture Design; CRM ↔ ERP ↔ BI ↔ Marketing ↔ Finance ↔ Ops integrations; Workflow Automation (n8n, Make, Zapier); Data Management & Migration; Monitoring & Maintenance; Web Scraping & Enrichment (Apify, PhantomBuster, SalesQL); Database Management (SQL, BigQuery, Supabase, Airtable); CRM & Tech Implementations.
Tools: n8n, Make, Zapier, Airtable, Softr, BigQuery, Supabase, Pinecone, Apify, PhantomBuster, SalesQL, Clearbit, ZoomInfo, Postman, Figma, Lucid, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Odoo.
Keywords: Automation, Integration, n8n, Zapier, Make.com, Scraping, Airtable, Softr, BigQuery, MySQL, SQL, Pinecone, Supabase, CRM, HubSpot, Notion, Salesforce, Odoo, System Architecture.

============================================================
AREA 8: DIGITAL EXPERIENCE & PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
Services: Web Development (WordPress, Webflow, Framer, Wix); E-commerce (Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, Magento); App Development & MVP; UX/UI Optimization (Figma); CRM Implementations (HubSpot, Notion, Salesforce, Odoo); Tech/SaaS Product Development; Digital Architecture; Automated Sales Solutions (TikTok shop, omnichannel); Performance Optimization (page speed, SEO technical).
Tools: WordPress, Webflow, Framer, Wix, Figma, Shopify, WooCommerce, Retool, Lovable, Cursor, Claude, V0, Bolt, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Hotjar, Google Analytics, Supabase, n8n.
Keywords: Web Development, Figma, Framer, Webflow, WordPress, WooCommerce, Shopify, App Development, Cursor, Claude, Lovable, V0, Bolt, UX/UI.`;

parameters.toolDescription: Returns rows from SWL's historical Upwork proposals sheet — every job SWL actually sent a proposal to in the last 60 days. Use this to learn the real applied criteria (what titles, budgets, and areas the team actually bet on). Treat 'Sent' as a positive precedent signal. Call this AFTER swl_services_kb to find 1-2 similar past jobs that justify the match decision.
